reviews.author: Preethi Elizabeth
reviews.review_body: Incredible display of CPSites.  Big shout out to all the teachers behind the program for beautifully managing the students. We, along with other parents, had a great time cheering up each other buds. The PA system was going a little bit on and off in a few programs, but nevertheless, the children continued their performance kuddos. Thank you CPS for having it a memorable event.

reviews.author: Kesava Raamanujam - R K Super Market
reviews.review_body:
I heartfully appreciate the teachers, students and the management for  organising such a wonderful event. Special thanks for selecting the topic which is very important in current world scenario and this gives the younger generation knowledge to save the world.
Kudos to the entire team once again. Thank you👏👏👏

reviews.author: Dayana Arunkumar
reviews.review_body:
Excellent and Well organised.
Kudos to all the students and teachers of CPS .
Nice to see  all kids performing without any fear and hesitation ..

reviews.author: Sumera Sikkander
reviews.review_body: Very nice program...great work by teachers and students...Hindi skit was amazingly performed..as well as all other performances.....great job!!!

reviews.author: Tharun Sundar
reviews.review_body: This school is kind of ok . But also very badd. No soace for sports. Pt period doesn't exist . Very rude staff most teachers are very biased. They change marks based on liking. There is also no good events. Most are canceled and this school has a history of issues and complaints. Students are not treated well either. 😕 No labs . No equipment. No control over ac . No field trips ever .. Problems are caused over nothing . Waste of money for useless projects . No competitions or recognition for extracurricular activities. Language options for higher grades only include tamil and hindi. Only good part is AC and Giant led board. Wouldn't recommend..

reviews.author: MaK HRR
reviews.review_body: There is no transparency in selection of students and expensive .

reviews.author: Selva Crr
reviews.review_body:
Best school for best education,
Advanced teaching technology senses, fully ac classrooms, efficient teachers, other curricular activities like esol examanination ,FIITJEE etc
